title: Spatial transcriptomics of planktonic and sessile bacterial populations at single-cell resolution
author: Dar, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Locations of RNA-molecules in biofilms after 10h and 35h of growth. This is raw data from the article "Spatial transcriptomics of planktonic and sessile bacterial populations at single-cell resolution" by Dar D. et al,  Science (2021) Vol 373, Issue 6556 DOI: 10.1126/science.abi4882, which was published here with permission of the author for use in the article "Hawinkel S, Yang X, Poelmans W, Motte H, Beeckman T, and Maere S. Unified nonparametric analysis of single-molecule spatial omics data using probabilistic indices." bioRxiv 2025
